infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow IMX Daily Expense to access microphone for voice expense entry.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow IMX Daily Expense to recognize your voice for adding expenses.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow IMX Daily Expense to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow IMX Daily Expense to use your camera.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow IMX Daily Expense to use the microphone for voice expense entry.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow IMX Daily Expense to recognize your voice for adding expenses.
